items.accessibility_caption: Photo by Anupam Kher on May 04, 2026. May be a cartoon of poster, card, magazine and text that says 'CONGRATULATIONS VIJAY FORA A GREAT VISTORY! @actorvijay'.

SHANAYA DHILLON -BIRMHAN ELLORAPATNAIK PATNAIK ASHLE GANGER AND DOLLY AHLU AHLUWALIA ANUPAMKHER KHER EISHAMARJARA MARIARA EISHA Calorie @caloriethefilm @cishamarjara @joebalass @ellora.patnaik @anupampkher @ashleyganger'.

items.accessibility_caption: Photo by Anupam Kher on May 05, 2026. May be an image of poster, magazine and text that says 'Just watched this incredible Canadian story on @primevideoca Congrats to everyone involved with this gem. MUST watch with your family! SHANAYA DHILLON -BIRMHAN ELLORAPATNAIK PATNAIK ASHLE GANGER AND DOLLY AHLU AHLUWALIA ANUPAMKHER KHER EISHAMARJARA MARIARA EISHA Calorie @caloriethefilm @cishamarjara @joebalass @ellora.patnaik @anupampkher @ashleyganger'.
